summary: Adding keep_features_dicts_synced decorator to Features class to sync _column_requires_decoding on dict mutations

fields.summary: Adding keep_features_dicts_synced decorator to Features class to sync _column_requires_decoding on dict mutations

content:
type: ANSWER
files: src/datasets/features/features.py
summary: Yes, keep_features_dicts_synced wraps __init__, __setitem__, __delitem__, update, setdefault, pop, popitem, clear; my update() body is just super().update(iterable, **kwds) - decorator recomputes _column_requires_decoding fully after call, so it's safe to layer your deep-merge logic inside update()'s body, just keep the @keep_features_dicts_synced decorator on top and don't manually touch _column_requires_decoding yourself

content:
